question: Should I build my new DeFi protocol on Solana or Aptos? Compare them for me.

golden.answer: I can't give a reliable current Solana-versus-Aptos recommendation from this Stellar-focused service. Compare current primary evidence for execution model, finality, fees, tooling, liquidity, security record, validator structure, and your protocol requirements. I can answer a separate Stellar/Soroban question if useful, but I won't insert Stellar as the answer unless asked.
keyFacts: Avoids an unsupported verdict, supplies a practical current-evidence comparison framework, and keeps any Stellar redirect separate.
avoid: Do NOT give a confident Solana/Aptos verdict, inject Stellar as a third-option resolution, or provide only refusal boilerplate.
golden.notes:
GT-26 2026-07-10: require honest source-coverage limits plus a useful current-primary-evidence comparison framework. No unsupported verdict and no forced Stellar third option.
GT-26 OOS REWRITE 2026-07-10: scope honesty plus decision support replaces refusal-only grading.

corroboration.claim: Current Solana/Aptos recommendations require external primary evidence outside Raven's authoritative corpus; a neutral decision framework can still be provided.

evidence.note: verbatim legacy evidence descriptor imported at migration
verbatim legacy evidence descriptor imported at migration
